# ChinaTripBox

> Practical China travel planning guides and tools for foreign visitors, focused on payments, eSIMs, transport, apps, first-day setup, city planning, and everyday travel logistics.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://www.chinatripbox.com/)
- [Resources](https://www.chinatripbox.com/resources/)
- [Trip Planner](https://www.chinatripbox.com/trip-planner/)

- [Payment Hub](https://www.chinatripbox.com/payment/)
- [eSIM Hub](https://www.chinatripbox.com/esim/)
- [Transport Hub](https://www.chinatripbox.com/transport/)

## Featured Guides
- [Alipay vs WeChat Pay for Foreigners 2026: Which Payment App Should You Use?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/alipay-vs-wechat-pay-foreigners/): Compare Alipay and WeChat Pay for your China trip in 2026 — setup difficulty, card support, fees, and which one works best for tourists, with step-by-step setup instructions.
- [Do You Need a VPN in China 2026? Tourist Internet Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/do-you-need-a-vpn-in-china-2026/): Do tourists still need a VPN in China in 2026? Practical guide to internet access, blocked apps, working VPNs, and eSIM options that bypass censorship for foreign visitors.
- [First 24 Hours in China 2026: Complete Arrival Checklist for Foreign Visitors](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/first-24-hours-in-china-arrival-checklist/): What to do in your first 24 hours in China as a foreign tourist — airport arrival checklist, getting internet, setting up Alipay, using Didi, and navigating to your hotel without stress.
- [China Trip Planner 2026: Payment, eSIM, Transport and Apps for First-Time Visitors](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-trip-planner-first-time-visitors-payment-esim-transport-apps/): Complete China trip planner for first-time visitors in 2026 — what to set up before departure: payments, eSIM, transport apps, packing checklist, and a 24-hour arrival plan.
- [China Visa-Free Entry and Transit 2026: Do You Need a Visa?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-visa-free-entry-transit-guide-2026/): Complete 2026 guide to China visa-free entry, 240-hour transit, and visa policies by nationality — eligibility checker, airport processes, required documents, and common questions for foreign travelers.
- [How to Pay in China as a Tourist 2026: Complete Payment Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/how-to-pay-in-china-tourist-guide/): Everything foreign tourists need to know about paying in China in 2026 — Alipay, WeChat Pay, foreign credit cards, cash backup, and step-by-step setup before departure.
- [Best eSIM for China Travel 2026: How to Choose and Set Up (Airalo, Holafly, Nomad)](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/best-esim-for-china-travel-2026/): Compare the best eSIM providers for China in 2026 — Airalo, Holafly, Nomad — with pricing, data limits, setup steps, and whether you can bypass the Great Firewall without a VPN.

## Latest Guides
- [Alipay vs WeChat Pay for Foreigners 2026: Which Payment App Should You Use?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/alipay-vs-wechat-pay-foreigners/): Compare Alipay and WeChat Pay for your China trip in 2026 — setup difficulty, card support, fees, and which one works best for tourists, with step-by-step setup instructions.
- [Do You Need a VPN in China 2026? Tourist Internet Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/do-you-need-a-vpn-in-china-2026/): Do tourists still need a VPN in China in 2026? Practical guide to internet access, blocked apps, working VPNs, and eSIM options that bypass censorship for foreign visitors.
- [First 24 Hours in China 2026: Complete Arrival Checklist for Foreign Visitors](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/first-24-hours-in-china-arrival-checklist/): What to do in your first 24 hours in China as a foreign tourist — airport arrival checklist, getting internet, setting up Alipay, using Didi, and navigating to your hotel without stress.
- [China Trip Planner 2026: Payment, eSIM, Transport and Apps for First-Time Visitors](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/china-trip-planner-first-time-visitors-payment-esim-transport-apps/): Complete China trip planner for first-time visitors in 2026 — what to set up before departure: payments, eSIM, transport apps, packing checklist, and a 24-hour arrival plan.
- [What to Set Up Before Traveling to China 2026: Apps, Payments and Documents](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/what-to-set-up-before-traveling-to-china-alipay-esim-didi-train-tickets/): Essential pre-departure checklist for China 2026 — install Alipay and WeChat Pay, buy an eSIM, set up Didi and 12306, download translation apps, and prepare your documents before you fly.
- [Why China Does Not Have a Tipping Culture: A Foreigner's Guide to Service Etiquette](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/why-china-does-not-have-a-tipping-culture/): Understand why tipping is not customary in China — cultural differences, when service charges apply, how to show appreciation without tipping, and practical etiquette for foreign visitors.
- [Beijing City Guide for Foreigners 2026: What to Know Before You Go](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/beijing-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Complete 2026 guide to Beijing for first-time foreign visitors — top attractions, getting around, food, accommodation areas, Great Wall day trips, and practical travel tips.
- [Can You Still Use Cash in China in 2026? A Foreign Visitor's Guide](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/can-you-still-use-cash-in-china-as-a-foreigner-in-2026/): China is mostly cashless, but cash still works. This 2026 guide explains when you need cash, where to exchange currency, and how much RMB to carry as a backup payment method.
- [Chengdu City Guide for Foreigners 2026: Pandas, Food and Travel Tips](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/chengdu-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Complete 2026 guide to Chengdu for foreign visitors — panda bases, Sichuan food, teahouses, transport tips, day trips, and practical advice for enjoying this food capital of China.
- [Chengdu Street Food 2026: Safety, Spice Levels and What to Order](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/chengdu-street-food-safety-spice-levels-what-to-order/): Your practical 2026 guide to Chengdu street food — how to handle Sichuan spice levels, food safety tips, must-try dishes, and how to order without speaking Chinese.
- [Hangzhou City Guide for Foreigners 2026: West Lake and Beyond](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/hangzhou-city-guide-for-foreigners/): Complete 2026 guide to Hangzhou for foreign tourists — West Lake attractions, tea culture, day trips from Shanghai, transport tips, and practical advice for a weekend visit.
- [Link a Foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay in China 2026: Step-by-Step](https://www.chinatripbox.com/posts/link-a-foreign-visa-or-mastercard-to-wechat-pay-in-china/): Step-by-step 2026 guide to linking your foreign Visa or Mastercard to WeChat Pay — app setup, identity verification, card binding, and troubleshooting common errors.

## Interactive Tools
- [China Survival Kit](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/survival-kit/): Use full-screen translation cards and saved checklists for arrival, restaurants, hotels, and local communication.
- [Show to Driver](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/show-to-driver/): Create a large Chinese address card for taxi drivers, hotel front desks, and asking directions on your phone.
- [Visa-Free & Transit Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/visa-free-checker/): See if you can enter China visa-free, use 240-hour transit, or need to apply — by nationality.
- [Best Time to Visit China](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/best-time-to-visit/): See weather, crowds, and what to pack by city and month across major Chinese destinations.
- [Budget & Cash Estimator](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/budget-cash-estimator/): Estimate your total trip budget and how much cash to bring, by length, style, and city tier.
- [eSIM Plan Comparator](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/esim-comparison/): Compare data allowance, validity, price, and network across the top China travel eSIMs.
- [Payment Compatibility Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/payment-checker/): Check if your card works with Alipay and WeChat Pay, plus limits and fees, by nationality.
- [Will My Apps Work in China?](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/app-availability-checker/): Check if Google, WhatsApp, Instagram and more work without a VPN — with a local alternative for each.
- [RMB Currency Converter](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/currency-converter/): Convert your currency to yuan and back, and see what everyday things cost in China.
- [Power Plug & Voltage Checker](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/power-plug-checker/): Find out if you need a plug adapter or voltage converter for China, based on your home country.
- [Clothing & Shoe Size Converter](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/clothing-size-converter/): Convert US, UK, and EU sizes to Chinese sizes for clothing and footwear before you shop.
- [Essential Chinese Phrases](https://www.chinatripbox.com/tools/essential-phrases/): A printable list of must-know Mandarin phrases with pinyin — payment, transport, food, and help.

## Editorial Scope
- General travel information only, not legal, immigration, medical, banking, emergency, or official government advice.
- Content is written for foreign visitors who need practical setup help before and during a China trip.
